required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes in-person meetings for departmental coordination in the Chicago office — schedules video calls only for external or off-site contacts when required

supersedes.fact: Always schedules video calls with remote department contacts — avoids lengthy email threads for coordination

required_preferences.fact: No longer requests remote work arrangements for family needs — strictly adheres to the office-required schedule and travel policies set by Deloitte

supersedes.fact: Requests flexibility to work remotely from Cleveland for several weeks to provide in-person care for her mother, prioritizing family over routine client travel during her mother's immediate recovery period

required_preferences.fact: Handles family conflict by setting boundaries, politely declining to mediate between her fiancé and her parents
Prefers texting or messaging with friends for casual check-ins — avoids spontaneous phone calls
Schedules weekly in-depth planning sessions with her fiancé to evaluate relocation pros and cons, using shared documents to track questions and decisions
Eats lunch with colleagues in the office cafeteria most days to facilitate team rapport — replaces prior solo lunch walks during remote/hybrid schedules.

persona: A 28-year-old junior auditor working at a multinational corporation
